sentence: 这个公式里有三个变量。
pinyin: Zhège gōngshì lǐ yǒu sān gè biànliàng.
english: There are three variables in this formula.

sentence: 这片湿地是候鸟的重要栖息地。
pinyin: Zhè piàn shīdì shì hòuniǎo de zhòngyào qīxīdì.
english: This wetland is an important habitat for migratory birds.

sentence: 洪水淹没了河边的低地。
pinyin: Hóngshuǐ yānmò le hé biān de dīdì.
english: The floodwaters submerged the lowlands by the river.

meaning: 1. to go onto the streets; 2. to go shopping
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒ xǐhuān shàng jiē guàngguang.
english: On weekends I like to go out and walk around the shops.

sentence: 这个品牌专注于高端市场。
pinyin: Zhège pǐnpái zhuānzhù yú gāoduān shìchǎng.
english: This brand focuses on the high-end market.
